quote: It's far better to buy a wonderful company at a fair price than a fair company at a wonderful price.
speaker: Warren Buffett

quote: Being too far ahead of your time is indistinguishable from being wrong.
speaker: Howard Marks

quote: Buy stocks, take sleeping pills, and look at the prices no more.
speaker: André Kostolany

quote: I'm only rich because I know when I'm wrong.
speaker: George Soros

quote: It's not whether you're right or wrong, but how much money you make when you're right and how much you lose when you're wrong.
speaker: George Soros

quote: Price is what you pay; value is what you get.
speaker: Warren Buffett
